# attributedText

**Instance Property**

The stylized attributed string for the text element as presented to the user in Photos.

## Declaration

```swift
var attributedText: NSAttributedString? { get }
```

## Describing a Text Element

- **text**: The raw unformatted string for the text element.
- **textElementType**: The enumerated type of the text element.
- **PHProjectTextElement.ElementType**: An enumeration of the type of text element.
